0.0921*(0.0102*exp(2.4677*x_2) + 0.042*sin(2.536*x_1 + 8.2876) - 1)**2 - 1.4548*(-sin(0.803*x_2 - 7.2038) - 0.2665*sinh(1.4849 - 1.6293*x_1) - 0.2415)**5 + 0.0297*sin(2.3285*x_2 + 2.2342*sinh(1.0623 - 1.2515*x_1) - 2.1118) - 0.5012

-0.2573*sin(1.0048*x_2 + 0.9641*sinh(1.0623 - 1.2515*x_1) - 1.4628) - 0.1525*sin(0.0319*exp(2.4677*x_2) + 0.131*sin(2.536*x_1 + 8.2876) - 5.0571) - 0.4229*sin(1.4416*sin(0.803*x_2 - 7.2038) + 0.3842*sinh(1.4849 - 1.6293*x_1) - 3.1848) + 1.4334
